changeSet.author: sydorenko

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM course WHERE title = 'course_1') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM course WHERE title = 'course_2') AND ( SELECT COUNT(ur.user_id) FROM user_role ur JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE r.name = 'student' ) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM enrollment WHERE course_id IN (SELECT id FROM course WHERE title IN ('course_1', 'course_2'));
